General.Name: Bains Mer Monaco
General.Description: Société Anonyme des Bains de Mer et du Cercle des Étrangers à Monaco operates in the gaming, hotels, and rental sectors in Monaco. It operates casinos; hotels; restaurants; lounge bars and nightclubs; wellness and leisure facilities; shows and concert halls; shopping centers; and meetings and events centers. The company is also involved in the slot machines, table games, and other activities; and rental of residential properties, boutiques, and offices. In addition, it offers catering services. The company was incorporated in 1863 and is headquartered in Monaco.
